public_api_inventory.name: QuicTpIdIsReserved
public_api_inventory.summary: Checks whether a transport parameter ID falls in a GREASE (reserved) range per RFC 9000 Section 22.3.
postconditions: Returns TRUE if ID matches 31*N+27 pattern, FALSE otherwise

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsReadSniExtension
public_api_inventory.signature: QUIC_STATUS QuicCryptoTlsReadSniExtension(_In_ QUIC_CONNECTION* Connection, _In_reads_(BufferLength) const uint8_t* Buffer, _In_ uint16_t BufferLength, _Inout_ QUIC_NEW_CONNECTION_INFO* Info)
public_api_inventory.summary: Parses TLS SNI extension payload to extract server hostname.
postconditions: Returns SUCCESS on valid parse; Info->ServerName set if host_name found
public_api_inventory.ownership: ServerName is borrowed pointer into Buffer

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsReadAlpnExtension
public_api_inventory.signature: QUIC_STATUS QuicCryptoTlsReadAlpnExtension(_In_ QUIC_CONNECTION* Connection, _In_reads_(BufferLength) const uint8_t* Buffer, _In_ uint16_t BufferLength, _Inout_ QUIC_NEW_CONNECTION_INFO* Info)
public_api_inventory.summary: Parses TLS ALPN extension payload to extract protocol ID list.
postconditions: Returns INVALID_PARAMETER if protocol ID length is 0 or buffer overflows
public_api_inventory.error_contract: QUIC_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER for zero-length protocol IDs or truncated data

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsReadExtensions
public_api_inventory.signature: QUIC_STATUS QuicCryptoTlsReadExtensions(_In_ QUIC_CONNECTION* Connection, _In_reads_(BufferLength) const uint8_t* Buffer, _In_ uint16_t BufferLength, _Inout_ QUIC_NEW_CONNECTION_INFO* Info)
public_api_inventory.summary: Iterates TLS ClientHello extensions, dispatching to SNI/ALPN/TP handlers.
postconditions: Returns SUCCESS if all required extensions found and valid

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsReadClientHello
public_api_inventory.signature: QUIC_STATUS QuicCryptoTlsReadClientHello(_In_ QUIC_CONNECTION* Connection, _In_reads_(BufferLength) const uint8_t* Buffer, _In_ uint32_t BufferLength, _Inout_ QUIC_NEW_CONNECTION_INFO* Info, _Out_ uint32_t* ClientHelloLength)
postconditions: Returns SUCCESS on valid parse; *ClientHelloLength set

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsGetCompleteTlsMessagesLength
public_api_inventory.signature: uint32_t QuicCryptoTlsGetCompleteTlsMessagesLength(_In_reads_(BufferLength) const uint8_t* Buffer, _In_ uint32_t BufferLength)
public_api_inventory.summary: Returns total byte length of complete TLS handshake messages in buffer.
postconditions: Returns 0 if no complete message; else total complete length

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsReadInitial
public_api_inventory.signature: QUIC_STATUS QuicCryptoTlsReadInitial(_In_ QUIC_CONNECTION* Connection, _In_reads_(BufferLength) const uint8_t* Buffer, _In_ uint32_t BufferLength, _Inout_ QUIC_NEW_CONNECTION_INFO* Info)
public_api_inventory.summary: Entry point for parsing TLS Initial crypto data.
postconditions: Returns SUCCESS on valid Initial data with Info populated

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsReadClientRandom
public_api_inventory.signature: QUIC_STATUS QuicCryptoTlsReadClientRandom(_In_reads_(BufferLength) const uint8_t* Buffer, _In_ uint32_t BufferLength, _Out_ uint8_t ClientRandom[TLS_RANDOM_LENGTH])
public_api_inventory.summary: Extracts 32-byte ClientRandom from TLS ClientHello buffer.

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsEncodeTransportParameters
public_api_inventory.signature: const uint8_t* QuicCryptoTlsEncodeTransportParameters(_In_opt_ QUIC_CONNECTION* Connection, _In_ BOOLEAN IsServerTP, _In_ const QUIC_TRANSPORT_PARAMETERS* TransportParams, _In_opt_ QUIC_PRIVATE_TRANSPORT_PARAMETER* TestParam, _Out_ uint32_t* TPLen)
public_api_inventory.summary: Serializes QUIC transport parameters into TLS wire format.
postconditions: Returns allocated buffer on success (caller owns)
public_api_inventory.error_contract: Returns NULL on alloc failure or PREFERRED_ADDRESS

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsDecodeTransportParameters
public_api_inventory.signature: BOOLEAN QuicCryptoTlsDecodeTransportParameters(_In_opt_ QUIC_CONNECTION* Connection, _In_ BOOLEAN IsServerTP, _In_reads_(TPLen) const uint8_t* TPBuf, _In_ uint16_t TPLen, _Out_ QUIC_TRANSPORT_PARAMETERS* TransportParams)
public_api_inventory.summary: Deserializes QUIC transport parameters from TLS wire format.
postconditions: Returns TRUE on success with TransportParams populated
public_api_inventory.error_contract: FALSE for duplicates, out-of-range, missing mandatory, truncated

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsCopyTransportParameters
public_api_inventory.signature: BOOLEAN QuicCryptoTlsCopyTransportParameters(_In_ const QUIC_TRANSPORT_PARAMETERS* Source, _Out_ QUIC_TRANSPORT_PARAMETERS* Destination)
public_api_inventory.summary: Deep-copies transport parameters including heap-allocated VersionInfo.
postconditions: Returns FALSE on VersionInfo alloc failure
public_api_inventory.ownership: Destination owns copies; must be cleaned up

public_api_inventory.name: QuicCryptoTlsCleanupTransportParameters
public_api_inventory.summary: Frees heap-allocated VersionInfo and clears VERSION_NEGOTIATION flag.
postconditions: VersionInfo freed, set to NULL; flag cleared

invariants: Flags indicates which fields are valid
If VERSION_NEGOTIATION set, VersionInfo may be heap-allocated

environment_invariants: MsQuic library must be initialized for encode/decode
MockConnection provides minimal state with Stats.QuicVersion
TP buffers use QUIC_POOL_TLS_TRANSPARAMS allocation tag
CxPlatTlsTPHeaderSize bytes prefix encoded TP buffer

bugs_found.description: Dead code: duplicate check for InitialMaxBidiStreams > QUIC_TP_MAX_STREAMS_MAX at lines 1566 and 1574. The second check is unreachable.
